attention1.ptxt: Before test, make sure that there is no vehicle behind so as to prevent rear-end collision.

s1.ptxt: While driving vehicle in 3rd gear of “D” range, shift down to “2” range and check if engine brake operates.
In the same way as in Step 1), check engine brake for operation when shifted down to “L” range.

condition.ptxt: Failure to operate when shifted down to “2” range

action.ptxt: Valve Body Assembly Removal and Installation .
Check O/D and 2nd coast brake referring to A/T Assembly Reassembly .

condition.ptxt: Failure to operate when shifted down to “L” range

action.ptxt: Valve Body Assembly Removal and Installation .
Check 1st and reverse brake referring to A/T Assembly Reassembly .
